caption: A news broadcast depicts a group of people walking outdoors on a paved area near buildings and foliage. A man in a white kurta and pajama leads the group, followed by others in professional attire, including a man in a dark vest over a white shirt and a woman in a beige sari. On-screen graphics include portraits of politicians and red and yellow text boxes. Phrases such as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार" and "मंत्री संतोष सुमन" appear alongside the figures. A prominent ticker at the bottom of all frames reads, "जे. पी. नड्डा: नीतीश का वापस आना सुखद समाचार है". The top headlines shift from "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" to "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाक़ी है" and "बिहार की राजनीति". As the sequence progresses, additional portraits and text labels, such as " डिप्टी CM सम्राट चौधरी" and "विजय सिन्हा", appear on the left, while the right side introduces "प्रेम कुमार" and "जय चौधरी".
